mapper.select: SELECT id AS ranking, original_id AS regionId, med_house_val AS houseValue, med_inc AS medianIncome, house_age AS avgHouseAge FROM top10_house_value_analysis ORDER BY ranking;
SELECT high_value AS highValue, mid_value AS midValue, low_value AS lowValue FROM house_value_zones;
SELECT affordability_level AS level, region_count AS count FROM housing_affordability_distribution ORDER BY level_order;
SELECT age_level AS ageLevel, region_count AS regionCount, level_order AS levelOrder FROM house_age_distribution ORDER BY level_order;

SELECT indicator_name AS indicatorName, score_value AS score, actual_value AS actualValue, description AS "desc", indicator_order AS indicatorOrder FROM exact_market_scoreboard WHERE indicator_order < 4 ORDER BY indicator_order;
SELECT latitude_zone AS latitudeZone, avg_house_value AS avgHouseValue, avg_income AS avgIncome FROM latitude_price_analysis ORDER BY max_latitude DESC;
SELECT latitude_group AS latitudeGroup, avg_house_age AS avgHouseAge, avg_rooms AS avgRooms, avg_occupancy AS avgOccupancy FROM latitude_zone_comparison ORDER BY max_latitude DESC;
SELECT age_range AS ageRange, avg_house_value AS avgHouseValue, avg_income AS avgIncome, avg_rooms AS avgRooms FROM simplified_age_value_analysis ORDER BY min_age ASC;
SELECT room_size AS roomSize, avg_house_price AS avgHousePrice, avg_income AS avgIncome, region_count AS regionCount FROM rooms_price_relationship ORDER BY min_rooms ASC;
SELECT county AS englishName, avg_median_income AS price FROM county_avg_income ORDER BY avg_median_income DESC;

SELECT CASE WHEN population >= 10000 THEN '大型' WHEN population >= 5000 AND population < 10000 THEN '中型' WHEN population >= 1000 AND population < 5000 THEN '小型' ELSE '微型' END AS populationSize, COUNT(*) AS regionCount FROM ods_housing_info GROUP BY populationSize ORDER BY CASE populationSize WHEN '大型' THEN 1 WHEN '中型' THEN 2 WHEN '小型' THEN 3 WHEN '微型' THEN 4 END ASC;
SELECT 区域ID AS regionId, 当前房屋价值 AS currentHouseValue, 居民收入 AS residentIncome, 房屋年龄 AS houseAge, 投资评分 AS investmentScore, 地理区域 AS geographicArea FROM housing_invest_recommend;
